rows.label: qev027104_MSG0001
rows.name:
What do you think? Were you able to
gather voices of support for us? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027104_MSG0002
rows.name:
If we can confirm the backing of many
people, then we will resolve to stand as
the representatives for the alien species. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027104_MSG0003
rows.name:
You may laugh at us for being cowardly,
but we too act with caution when
initiating a major undertaking. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027104_MSG0004
rows.name: Oh, I have been awaiting your return. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027104_MSG0005
rows.name:
So... What were the voices
of the city's people like? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027104_MSG0006
rows.name:
............My goodness! The people placed
such high expectations upon us...! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027104_MSG0008
rows.name:
If we do not stand now, we will not
be able to face the people who spoke
so highly of us moving forward. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027104_MSG0009
rows.name:
Furthermore... you, who have poured
so much effort into this matter
alongside us, are also endorsing us... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027104_MSG0010
rows.name: I wish to respond to those sentiments! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027104_MSG0012
rows.name:
We hereby resolve to participate in
the provisional government as the
representatives of the alien species. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027104_MSG0013
rows.name:
We will, of course, ask the voters
to judge the merits of this resolution
in the election, but... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027104_MSG0014
rows.name:
We will throw our full strength
into our campaign activities. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027104_MSG0015
rows.name:
All for a hopeful future for
the alien species... No, for
the Earthlings as well. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027104_MSG0016
rows.name:
We, the Orphe, swear here and
now to dedicate ourselves
entirely to this cause...! [ST:wait ]
